title: The Words Of Wisdom. from Proverbial Philosophy
meaning:
This evocative piece by Martin Farquhar Tupper, titled "The Words Of Wisdom. from Proverbial Philosophy", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...

meta.dates: July 17, 1810 in London - November 1889 in Albury, Surrey
